title: Events at the Melbourne Sports and Entertainment Precinct
articleDescription: We’re running extra services for events at Rod Laver Arena, Margaret Court Arena and John Cain Arena.
articleContent:
Plan your journey

If you use Journey Planner within 14 days of your event, you'll see all the extra services we've added to help you get there.

We're running extra trams to and from these events.

May events

  • Guy Sebastian, 22 May – 24 May
  • Melbourne Mavericks v Sunshine Coast Lightning, 23 May
  • Five, 23 May
  • Melbourne Vixens v NSW Swifts, 24 May
  • i-dle, 27 May
  • Nancy Ajram, 29 May
  • Monster Truck Mania, 30 May – 31 May

June events

  • Anirudh, 4 June
  • Ella Mai, 6 June
  • Melbourne Vixens v Melbourne Mavericks, 7 June
  • Freya Sky, 11 June
  • Melbourne Mavericks v Queensland Firebirds, 13 June
  • Melbourne Vixens v West Coast Fever, 14 June
  • IVE, 16 June
  • I Prevail, 18 June
  • Leehom, 20 June
  • Dave, 23 June
  • Motionless in White, 24 June
  • Shreya Ghoshal, 28 June
     

Catch a Route 70a tram from Flinders Street Station to Stop 7C MCG Gates 4-7/John Cain Arena.

Start travelling

Other helpful resources

  • Visitors to Victoria: Here for a special event? Read more about our public transport system.
  • Help and support: View popular public transport topics, including ticketing.
  • Accessible travel: View resources for people with accessibility needs on public transport.
  • VicTraffic: Road closures, bushfire activity and other events on Victoria’s roads may affect your journey. Plan a safer trip by viewing real-time alerts on VicTraffic.
